tools.name: authController.getBasicUserInformation
tools.description: Once logged in and have a token, get basic user information including group role membership

tools.name: authController.logIn
tools.description: Authenticate using username and password, returns token, which must be added to X-Auth-Token in header of all future requests

tools.name: observationController.getObservationsByCode
tools.description: Given a User ID and observation code, retrieve all observations.

tools.name: observationController.getObservationsByCodes
tools.description: Given a User ID and search parameters, retrieve a page of observations.

tools.name: observationController.getPatientEnteredObservationsByCode
tools.description: Given a User ID and observation code, retrieve patient entered observations.

tools.name: observationHeadingController.getAvailableObservationHeadings
tools.description: Given a User ID retrieve a list of available observation types for that user (where they have observation data).

tools.name: observationHeadingController.getPatientEnteredObservationHeadings
tools.description: Given a User ID retrieve a list of available observation types for that user (where they have patient entered observation data).

tools.name: patientController.getBasicPatientDetails
tools.description: Given a User ID, get basic patient information for a user from clinical data stored in FHIR

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
